title: Words With Silent Letters
editorialSummary: Words grouped by which letter is silent: silent K, silent B, silent G, silent W. Players recognise the words but must identify the silent letter pattern. False trail: 'Gnaw' has silent G like 'Gnat' — both land in the G group.

meta.gptRationale: Silent-letter patterns are taught early and the categories are direct, concrete, and low in false trails.
